scripts.mobile:android:build:aab: npm run mobile:android:sync-icons && npm run mobile:android:apply-cleartext-policy && npm run tauri -- android build --aab
scripts.mobile:android:build:apk: npm run mobile:android:sync-icons && npm run mobile:android:apply-cleartext-policy && npm run tauri -- android build --apk
